title: JourneyPAC
description: A JourneyMap plugin which displays chunks claimed via OpenPAC
body:
# JourneyPAC
JourneyPAC is a clientside mod for minecraft and a JourneyMap plugin which displays chunks claimed via OpenPAC.  
Inspired by [JourneyMap Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap-integration) which does the same for the FTB claims system.

## Dependencies
- [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap)
- [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims)
- (Before 1.1.7, Fabric) [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
